title: Install the A-Axis Gearbox
summary: Mount the A-axis gearbox in the documented orientation, secure it with eight M5x18 socket-head screws tightened to 5.1 Nm (45.1 in-lb) using blue or red Loctite®, reinstall referenced components, reinstall panels as needed, and restart the operator station using the referenced source procedures.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when installing or re-installing the A-axis gearbox on the OptiSweep system after gearbox service or replacement, where the source directs the technician to mount the gearbox, orient the clamp collar access hole correctly, secure the gearbox fasteners, reinstall dependent components, and return the operator station to service.
not_for: Do not use this runbook as a substitute for the referenced Motor Installation procedure on page 108.
Do not use this runbook as a substitute for the referenced gripper Installation procedure on page 100.
Do not use this runbook as a substitute for the referenced counter-balance installation procedure on page 96.
Do not use this runbook as a substitute for the referenced Starting The Operator Station procedure on page 66.

responsibilities: Perform the mechanical installation of the A-axis gearbox.
Install and torque the specified fasteners with Loctite®.
Reinstall referenced components by following the cited source procedures.
Reassemble panels as needed and restart the operator station using the referenced procedure.

safety_notes: This is not marked support-safe in the candidate and involves mechanical installation and lifting.
Use only the specified hardware and torque values supported by the source packet.
This procedure depends on other referenced procedures for motor installation, gripper installation, counter-balance installation, and operator station restart details.
access_or_tools_needed: Physical access to the A-axis gearbox mounting location
Torque tool capable of 5.1 Nm (45.1 in-lb)
Access to referenced procedures on pages 96, 100, 108, and 66

access_required: Physical access to the A-axis gearbox mounting location
Access to referenced procedures on pages 96, 100, 108, and 66
system_preconditions: A-axis gearbox is available to be installed.
Referenced components removed earlier in service are available for reinstallation if applicable.

steps.title: Lift the A-axis gearbox into place
steps.purpose: Position the gearbox at its mounting location so installation can begin.
steps.instruction: Lift the A-axis gearbox into place at the mounting location.
steps.expected_result: The gearbox is positioned for installation.
steps.healthy_condition: The gearbox is seated in the installation position and can be oriented and fastened.
steps.failure_condition: The gearbox cannot be safely positioned or held in place for installation.

actions.label: Position gearbox
actions.exact_action: Lift the A-axis gearbox into place.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall A-axis gearbox identification and mounting context.
Gearbox visual context for placement and surrounding assembly.

stop_or_escalate_if: The gearbox cannot be safely lifted into place.
The gearbox cannot be positioned at the mounting location.

source_evidence.text: Lift the A-axis gearbox into place.

steps.title: Orient the clamp collar access hole
steps.purpose: Ensure the gearbox is installed in the documented orientation.
steps.instruction: Orient the clamp collar access hole toward the rounded side of the carriage.
steps.expected_result: The clamp collar access hole faces the rounded side of the carriage.
steps.healthy_condition: The access hole orientation matches the documented installation direction.
steps.failure_condition: The gearbox cannot be oriented with the clamp collar access hole toward the rounded side of the carriage.

actions.label: Set gearbox orientation
actions.exact_action: Orient the clamp collar access hole toward the rounded side of the carriage.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Gearbox body and surrounding carriage geometry for orientation context.
Gearbox visual reference that may help identify the clamp collar access area.

stop_or_escalate_if: The gearbox cannot be oriented with the clamp collar access hole toward the rounded side of the carriage.

source_evidence.text: Orient the clamp collar access hole toward the rounded side of the carriage.
Escalate if the gearbox cannot be oriented with the clamp collar access hole toward the rounded side of the carriage.

steps.title: Install the gearbox mounting screws
steps.purpose: Secure the gearbox to the assembly using the specified hardware.
steps.instruction: Install the eight (8) M5x18 socket-head screws.
steps.expected_result: All eight specified screws are installed in the gearbox mounting points.
steps.healthy_condition: Eight M5x18 socket-head screws are present and engaged correctly.
steps.failure_condition: Specified hardware is unavailable or the screws cannot be installed correctly.

actions.label: Install mounting hardware
actions.exact_action: Install the eight (8) M5x18 socket-head screws.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screws cannot be installed correctly.

source_evidence.text: Install the eight (8) M5x18 socket-head screws.
Escalate if the specified hardware is unavailable or if the required torque or Loctite® application cannot be completed.

steps.title: Torque the mounting screws
steps.purpose: Apply the documented final torque to the gearbox mounting fasteners.
steps.instruction: Tighten the eight screws to 5.1 Nm (45.1 in-lb).
steps.expected_result: All eight mounting screws are tightened to the specified torque.
steps.healthy_condition: Each of the eight screws is tightened to 5.1 Nm (45.1 in-lb).
steps.failure_condition: The required torque cannot be applied or verified.

actions.label: Torque fasteners
actions.exact_action: Tighten the eight screws to 5.1 Nm (45.1 in-lb).

stop_or_escalate_if: The required torque cannot be completed.

source_evidence.text: Tighten the eight screws to 5.1 Nm (45.1 in-lb).
Escalate if the specified hardware is unavailable or if the required torque or Loctite® application cannot be completed.

steps.title: Apply Loctite® to the fasteners
steps.purpose: Use the documented threadlocking compound on the gearbox fasteners.
steps.instruction: Use blue or red Loctite® on the fasteners.
steps.expected_result: The gearbox fasteners have blue or red Loctite® applied as specified.
steps.healthy_condition: Specified Loctite® has been used on the fasteners.
steps.failure_condition: Required Loctite® application cannot be completed.

actions.label: Apply threadlocker
actions.exact_action: Use blue or red Loctite® on the fasteners.

stop_or_escalate_if: Required Loctite® application cannot be completed.

source_evidence.text: Use blue or red Loctite® on the fasteners.
Escalate if the specified hardware is unavailable or if the required torque or Loctite® application cannot be completed.

steps.healthy_condition: Motor installation is completed using the referenced source procedure.

success_criteria: The A-axis gearbox is installed with the clamp collar access hole facing the rounded side of the carriage.
Eight M5x18 socket-head screws are installed.
The eight screws are tightened to 5.1 Nm (45.1 in-lb).
Blue or red Loctite® is used on the fasteners.
Referenced components are reinstalled as applicable.
Top and/or bottom side panels are reinstalled as needed.
The operator station is restarted using the referenced procedure.
healthy_conditions: The gearbox is mounted in the documented orientation.
Specified hardware is installed and torqued to the documented value.
Referenced dependent components are restored using their cited procedures.
The system is reassembled sufficiently for operator station restart.
failure_conditions: The gearbox cannot be oriented with the clamp collar access hole toward the rounded side of the carriage.
Required Loctite® application cannot be completed.
Referenced procedures needed for motor, gripper, counter-balance, or operator station restart are unavailable or cannot be completed.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the gearbox cannot be oriented with the clamp collar access hole toward the rounded side of the carriage.
Escalate if the specified hardware is unavailable or if the required torque or Loctite® application cannot be completed.
Escalate when completion depends on referenced procedures whose details are not present in this source packet.
